overview.description: The ASML Holding NV ADRhedged (ASMH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ASML Holding NV Sponsored ADR index. The fund provides exposure to ASML Holding ADR, while using swaps to hedge daily currency fluctuations. The fund aims to provide the total return performance of ASML Holding, in its local market, to US investors. ASMH was launched on Mar 13, 2025 and is issued by ADRhedged.
